content: Add STRIPE_API_KEY to backend .env + verify emergentintegrations import
Create core/orders.py (founder counter atomic + tier pricing) + core/genesis.py + core/license_generator.py
Create routers/payments.py with POST session, GET status, POST webhook endpoints
Create routers/ecosystem.py (genesis email, founder counter, b2b inquiry)
Wire new routers + indexes into server.py startup
POC test: curl create session → verify URL + DB transaction created
Frontend Phase 2: Create i18n keys (ecosystem.*, payment.*, funding.*, roadmapTracks.*) FR+EN parity
Frontend Phase 2: Build lib/ecosystem.ts + 8 ecosystem components + Ecosystem page + Payment page
Frontend Phase 2: Update App.tsx routes + TopNav.tsx nav entries
Final: tsc --noEmit → yarn build clean, screenshots validated, testing_agent_v3 integration test
Update LAUNCH_PLAYBOOK.md with Sprint 20 activation steps (Stripe, Genesis admin, B2B intake)
